title: rubus × luteolus
intro: Rubus × luteolus, also known as the yellow raspberry or yellow-flowering bramble, is a hybrid plant between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × luteolus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant support, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Rubus × luteolus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in herbal supplements to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
